2026-04-13T02:02:25.0973033Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0977435Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0980128Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0980738Z 
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0981120Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0983048Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0983599Z 
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0983839Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0984210Z 
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0984438Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0984777Z 
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0984989Z   git switch -
2026-04-13T02:02:25.0986115Z
